body_txt: Beneath the earth, you can find a strange bunch of people, skilled at digging and with an unusual rodent-like appearance. They usually resemble anthropomorphic moles, fossoreal rodents such as gophers and mole rats, stooped and pale humanoids, or some mixture thereof. They may be a naturally subterranean species or else descendants of humans from the surface who've gone a little... odd over time. As a rule, the former is usually true for the kinds that look like giant moles, while the latter is typically the case for the ones that look like pale, hunched humans. They typically live in caves, such as in a Fantastic Underworld , or may be part of a vast civilization living in Underground Cities and Tunnel Networks . Some may be found living closer to the surface, often in tunnels and sewers beneath the cities of the surface-dwellers . Culturally, they're either profound isolationists with little interest in the surface lands or else may dream of invading and conquering the human world to take advantage of its rich resources and living space. In some cases, they may start as the first case but be provoked into hostility by human actions. Compare The Morlocks , which are degenerate, cannibalistic descendants of surface-dwellers who have spent too much time underground. Not to be confused with The Mole . Compare Mole Miner .
